titleStmt.title: SII 41.282: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 282. (A.R. No. 499 of 1905.) Jambukēśvaram, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the east wall of the third prakārā in the Jambukēśvara temple at Tiruvānaikāval.

summary.p: Sale of land and house-sites belonging to their shares by Tāmaṇi Tēvaṉ alias Niṟai-uḍai-chōḻapēraraiyaṉ and his younger brothers who had kāṇi rights in Kārichāttaṉ-kuṟai in Kīḻpalāṟu of Pāchchilkūṟṟam in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple of Tiruvāṉaikkāvuḍaiya-nāyaṉār in Pāṇḍiyakulāchaṉivaḷanāḍu. It is said that the village had twelve shares (paṅgu) in all, in which the present sellers had four shares. A number of people in this and neighboring villages signed the document as witnesses and Perumāṉ Aḻagan alias Maṇavāḷa-muttaraiyaṉ gave surety deed for the payment of the sale price (kiḻipuṇai-tīṭṭu). The reason for the sale is not given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvana ccakravattikaḷ śrī rājarājarājarāja = [Picture.] This short form to denote Rājarāja is found in some following inscriptions too.tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 Āvatu ṛṣabha nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu dvādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ pāṇṭiyakulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷukku rāja rājarājarāja = [Picture.] This short form to denote Rājarāja is found in some following inscriptions too.vaḷanāṭṭup pācciṟ kūṟṟattu
kkiḻpalāṟṟuk kāricāttaṉkuṟaikkāṇi Uṭaiya Ōṭamuṭaiyāril tāmaṇitevaṉāṉa niṟaiuṭaicoḻapperayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Uṭaiyāṉ [rājarāja] nāṭāḻvāṉum periyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ampalavaṉ poṉṉampala nāṭāḻvāṉum Uṭaiyāṉ Ātiyāṉa coḻapāṇṭiyap perayaṉum Ivanta
mpi tiriyairuntāṉum kulaiyaṉ tāḻiyāṉa vitiviṭaṅkanāṭāḻvāṉum Ivvaṉaivom nilavilaipramāṇa Icaivuttīṭṭu Ikkāricāttaṉkuṟaiyil Iṟṟai nāḷāl nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamum maṉaiyumāvatu Ikkāricāttaṉkuṟaikku Icainta kiḻpāṟkellai Icaṉaikkuṟai Ellaikku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai Innāyaṉār
tevatāṉam tirunāmattukkāṇi Appūtikuṟaikku vaṭakkil ciṟṟāṟṟukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellaiappūtikuṟai Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āṟṟu nīroṭu kālukkutteṟkum Icainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ vuṭpaṭṭa nilattāl paṅku 10 2 Ippaṅku panniraṇṭil pollātāṉ ṉāṉa poṉṉimaḻai nāṭāḻvāṉu
(ṉu)m Uṭaiyāṉ nañcuṇṭāṉāṉa neṟkuppai Arayaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār paṅkāy muṉṉāḷil Innāyaṉār civanāmattil viṟṟa paṅku 4 Ippaṅku nālum nikki niṉṟa paṅkil Eṅkaḷutāṉa paṅku 4 Ippaṅku nālum nikki niṉṟa paṅkil Eṅkaḷutāṉa paṅku 4 Ippaṅku nālil Ivvūr Aiyaṉār kuṉṟavaḷanāṭaṟku śrīkoyilun tirumuṟṟamun tirunantavaṉattukkum Eṅkaḷopātiyil nikkiṉa nilam Araimā
vum nikki nikkiniṉṟa paṅkāl vanta nilamum maṉaiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 4 1000 Inta kācu nalāyiramum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaicelavaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭai
ya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevarkaṉmikaḷukku tāmaṇi tevaṉāṉa niṟai Uṭaic coḻapperayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Uṭaiyāṉ [rāja rāja*] nāṭāḻvāṉum periyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉ Ivaṉ tampi Amapalavaṉ poṉṉampala nāṭāḻvāṉum Uṭaiyāṉ Ātiyāṉa coḻapāṇṭiya perayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi ti
riyairuntāṉum kulaiyaṉ tāḻiyāṉa vitiviṭaṅkanāṭāḻvaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṅku nālāl vanta nilattukkum maṉaikkum Innilattu meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṉṟuṅ kaṉṟunilaipāḻum Āṟum Āṟiṭupaṭukaiyum Uṭpaṭa Ikkācu nālāyiramume vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve
porumāvaṟutip poruḷcelavolaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu kkaṭavatallātatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkaṟa viṟṟup vilaiporuḷaṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭukkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āti
caṇṭeśvaratevarkaṉmikaḷukku maṇitevaṉāṉa niṟaiuṭaiccoḻapperayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Uṭaiyāṉ rājarāja* nāṭāḻvāṉum periyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ampalavaṉ poṉṉampala nāṭāḻvāṉum Āti Āṉa coḻapāṇṭiyapperayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi tiriyairuntāṉum kulaiyaṉ tāḻiyāṉa vi
tiviṭaṅka nāṭāḻvāṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṅku nālukkum Ivarkaḷ veṇumeṉṟapote pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭukkak kaṭavomākavum kuṭuttilomākil Inta pramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭe pramāṇamāvutākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu nila vilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār
tiruvāṉaikkāuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉmikaḷukku tāmaṇitevaṉāṉa niṟaiuṭaic coḻapperayaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Uṭaiyāṉ [rājarāja*]nāṭāḻvāṉum periyāṉ nāyaṇaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Ampalavaṉ poṉṉampala nāṭāḻvāṉum Uṭaiyāṉ Ātiyāṉa coḻapāṇṭiyap peraya
num Ivaṉ tampi tiriyairuntāṉum kulaiyaṉ tāḻiyāṉa vitiviṭaṅkanāṭāḻvāṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ippiramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭeḻutiṉeṉ mātānamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ kaḻumalaviṭaṅkaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tāmaṇitevaṉ niṟaiuṭaic coḻapperayaṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku kiḻāṟṟūr kāvaṟkāṇi Uṭaiya cittaṉ perumāḷā
ṉa kiḻāṟṟūr nāṭāḻvāṉeḻuttu Ivaiuṭaiyāṉ Āti Āṉa coḻapāṇṭiyap perayaṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivai tiruveḷḷaṟai piṭākai putukkuṭiyāṉa Inta Irājentiracoḻa maṅkalattuk kāvakāṇi Uṭaiya perumāṉ Aḻakaṉ maṇavāḷa muttarayaṉeḻuttu Itu Uṭaiyāṉ rājarājarājarāja = [Picture]. This short form to denote ṟājarāja is found in some following inscriptions too.nāṭāḻvāṉ kaimmāṭṭāṅkā
maikku Itu kuṭantai Uṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ mātuyarantittāṉeḻuttu Itu periyāṉ nārāyaṇaṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikkum kuvalaiyaṉ tāḻiyāṉa sayiñai Āṉamaikkum Ivai Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikāvuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatānam tirunāmattukkāṇi kiḻāṟṟūr kiḻavaṉ cuntaraviṇṇa
kar Emperumāṉ koyil tiruvaṭipiṭikkum śrīkraṣṇaṉ niṉṟa nampi Eḻuttu Itu tiriyairuntāṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Uṭaiyārśrīkayilāyamuṭaiyār koyil pūcikkum catācivapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ituperiyāṉ Ampalavaṉāṉa poṉṉampala nāṭāḻvāṉ sayiñai Āṉamaikku Ivai kiḻāṟṟūr Arayaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ turaiyūruṭai
yāṉ vaṭakaraināṭṭu muventaveḷāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ taṇṭaṅkuṟai vikkiramacoḻanallūruṭaiyāṉ viḷānāṭṭu veḷāṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ miṉavaṉ vallavaraiyaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivaṉ periyāḻvāṉ Āram veḷāṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tapañāyakkuṟai Aracūr ki tillaippirāṉ Āṇṭāṉ cattiyakara
ṉapperumāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ śrīnaraciṅkapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Icaṇaikkuṟaittillaināyakaṉ cempaiyaṇṭāṉeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Aracūr kemutavaṉ Āḷumpirāṉ poṟkoyil nampi Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.282 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
